title: CUDA kernel for ggml_dsv4_fp8_kv_quantize, dual native+software path (V4 CUDA port Stream C)

history.note: Plan + spec pre-written and pre-fixed with Stream A lessons. Stream A merged; C unblocked. Most complex stream: dual native+software FP8 path via __CUDA_ARCH__ dispatch; software path must compile under -DCMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES=70 as upstream-compat gate.

REVISE: three blocking issues. (1) Algorithm wrong: plan round-tripped raw values through FP8, but CPU/Metal reference processes the prefix in 64-element blocks with per-block scale = exp2(ceil(log2(max(amax, 1e-4) / 448))), then quantize/dequantize clamp(v/scale, -448, 448) and multiply by scale. (2) -b CPU,CUDA still present at lines 49/389/407/416; harness uses strcmp at test-backend-ops.cpp:9882 — comma list silently no-ops, omitting -b is correct. (3) Innermost stride ignored: kernel decoded outer strides but indexed s[i0]/d[i0] as if nb00==sizeof(float). Plus non-blocking nits: tolerance text said 1e-2 (actual 1e-3 per test-backend-ops.cpp:5034), supports_op should check op->type too, AI co-author lines violate AGENTS.md.

Plan rewritten: per-row CUDA blocks with 64 threads, two-stage warp-shuffle max-reduction for amax across 64 prefix elements, per-block scale formula matches CPU ref ops.cpp:11293-11306, quantize-dequantize clamp(v/scale, -448, 448) multiplied by scale. Software emulation rewritten as nearest-even E4M3FN code search (lines 1..126) mirroring ggml_dsv4_e4m3fn_dequant at ops.cpp:11235-11262. Native path uses __nv_fp8_e4m3 class wrapper. Innermost dim uses byte-stride indexing (nb00/nb0). All -b CPU,CUDA removed. Tolerance updated to 1e-3. supports_op strengthened. AI co-author lines removed.

REVISE: three issues remain after r1 fixes. (A) Literal -b CPU,CUDA still appeared once in an explanatory note (line 422). (B) NEW-BLOCKING shared-mem race: warp 0 lanes 0 AND 1 both wrote warp_max[0] in the combine step. (C) NEW-BLOCKING native intrinsic: __nv_cvt_fp8_to_float does not exist in NVIDIA's API (only __nv_cvt_fp8_to_halfraw); the native path would not compile. R1's block-quantization algorithm fix and byte-stride indexing fix were confirmed correct.

Plan revised again: (A) explanatory note rephrased to avoid the literal '-b CPU,CUDA' string (now says '-b with a backend list'). (B) Combine step changed to single writer: 'if (warp_id == 0 && lane == 0)' — only one thread writes warp_max[0]. (C) Native path switched to NVIDIA's documented class wrapper: const __nv_fp8_e4m3 q(x); return float(q); — this is the supported public API and avoids the non-existent __nv_cvt_fp8_to_float. Prose references to the deprecated intrinsic pair updated to recommend the class wrapper.

APPROVE: all three round-2 issues fixed. (A) zero matches for '-b CPU,CUDA' in plan invocations. (B) single-writer combine confirmed: 'if (warp_id == 0 && lane == 0)'. (C) native path uses '__nv_fp8_e4m3 q(x); return float(q)' under #if __CUDA_ARCH__ >= 890. No new blocking issues. State -> implementing; ready to dispatch builder.

Builder ran in worktree /Users/cchuter/work/llama.cpp.C-fp8-kv (off feat/v4-port-cuda 947f1757b). Created dsv4-fp8-kv-quantize.{cu,cuh}, registered op in ggml-cuda.cu (include line 25, dispatch case ~2942, supports_op ~5212). Implementation follows approved plan v2 verbatim: per-row CUDA block / 64 threads, warp-shuffle amax reduction with single-writer combine, per-64-element scale = exp2(ceil(log2(amax/448))), clamp(v/scale,-448,448) round-trip times scale, byte-stride innermost indexing, software E4M3FN code-search mirroring ops.cpp:11242-11253, native path via __nv_fp8_e4m3 class wrapper guarded on __CUDA_ARCH__>=890. CMakeLists already globs *.cu so no edit needed.

Implementation complete. Diff: dsv4-fp8-kv-quantize.cuh (new, 36 LOC), dsv4-fp8-kv-quantize.cu (new, 164 LOC), ggml-cuda.cu (+7 LOC). Total 207 LOC, well within 700-LOC budget. No edits to other streams' files. Ready for codex code-review.

APPROVE on round 1, all 10 review items PASS: (1) algorithm matches CPU ref structure; (2) software E4M3FN search byte-for-byte vs ops.cpp:11235-11262; (3) native path guarded both at include and use; (4) byte-stride innermost; (5) single-writer combine confirmed; (6) syncthreads placement correct; (7) dispatcher registered at .cu:25, :2942-2944, :5212-5214; (8) asserts match CPU; (9) stay-in-lane confirmed (CMake unchanged due to glob); (10) no std::/host-only in device code. State -> testing.

Primary gate (./build-cuda/bin/test-backend-ops -o DSV4_FP8_KV_QUANTIZE, COUNT>=4) and secondary gate (-DCMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES=70 compile-only) cannot run from darwin/arm64 orchestrator host -- no nvcc. Same blocker hit by B-expand (see commit e020a8f91). Implementation pushed to mine; awaits CUDA host (RTX 6000 Ada SM_89 or RTX 5090 SM_120) to execute gates before fast-forward into feat/v4-port-cuda and move to tasks/done/.
